assessment.note: Mentoring interest expressed but stalled for three months without follow-up — engagement signal is negative.

new_queue.label: Mentoring block
new_queue.name: What's blocked the mentoring from happening — your time, opportunity, or something else?
new_queue.description: Identifies specific barriers preventing mentoring from progressing.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Mentoring vision
new_queue.name: What would you like mentoring to look like in your role?
new_queue.description: Explores Priya's vision for mentoring within her current role.
